mapper.update:
UPDATE user_address
name = #{name},
phone = #{phone},
city = #{city},
detail_address = #{detail},
is_default = #{isDefault},
update_time = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_address ( user_id, name, phone, city, detail_address, is_default, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{name}, #{phone}, #{city}, #{detail}, #{isDefault}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE user_address SET is_default = CASE WHEN id = #{id} THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, update_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_sign_record (user_id, sign_date, sign_time, points) VALUES (#{userId}, NOW(),NOW(), 5)
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM user_sign_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND sign_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) ORDER BY sign_date DESC
